getNormalizedWeights().details: Weights are interpolated between start and end weights based on time progress.

returns.normalizedWeights: Array of current normalized weights (sum to 1e18).

returns.projectTokenIndex: Index of the project token (0 or 1).
returns.reserveTokenIndex: Index of the reserve token (0 or 1).

returns._0: True if project token can only be bought, not sold back.
True if current time is between startTime and endTime.

getGradualWeightUpdateParams().notice: Get the gradual weight update parameters.

getNormalizedWeights().notice: Get the current normalized weights of the pool tokens.

isProjectTokenSwapInBlocked().notice: Check if project token swaps in are blocked.

isSwapEnabled().notice: Check if swaps are currently enabled.
